text: Being here, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The glass walls and bright lights make the place feel open yet controlled. As I approach the R&D display, I wonder about the boundaries of progress and the intersections of technology and humanity. There’s an energy here—questions waiting for answers, the future in the present’s hands. I feel alert, thoughtful, and ever so slightly unsettled by the confrontation with innovation and its implications.
